# .NET Version Upgrade

## Preferences
- **Flow Mode**: Automatic
- **Target Framework**: net10.0 (LTS)
- **FluentAssertions**: Maximum allowed version 7.2.2
- **MediatR**: Pin version 12.5.0

## Source Control
- **Source Branch**: CSP-2501-upgrade-to-NET10
- **Working Branch**: CSP-2501-upgrade-to-NET10
- **Commit Strategy**: After Each Task
